creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 190645
Copy of web browser window

I submitted following bug report.

Bug 225902 editors/emacs editors/emacs-devel: fix configure error when devel/liblockfile is installed
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=225902

Since maintainer of both editors/emacs and editors/emacs-devel is emacs@FreeBSD.org, I tried to set maintainer-feedback flag. But after I clicked 'Save Changes' button, I get following error messages.

> Bugzilla was unable to make any match at all for one or more of the names and/or email addresses you entered on the previous page.
> Please go back and try other names or email addresses.
> maintainer-feedback requestee: emacs@FreeBSD.org did not match anything

And I wasn't able to set maintainer-feedback flag.

Attached file is copy of web browser window.
